CCSF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING POINTS AND AUTHORITIES TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 18, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF ALL OTHER PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: teresa tan, deputy city attorney, 415.554.3800, for defendant city and county of san francisco; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Dismiss is Continued to July 30, 2013 to give CCSF the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. CCSF must deliver courtesy copies of the moving points and authorities to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the all other papers. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
